name: studio.create_blog_category
description: Create a new blog category on an Actium Studio site. Returns the assigned category_id.
whenToUse: Operator is setting up a new blog and needs the initial category taxonomy (e.g. 'Product', 'Engineering', 'Customer Stories').
A post-create flow requires a category that doesn't exist yet; create it before assigning to the post.
Taxonomy migration: scripted creation of categories from an external CMS export.
whenNotToUse: A category with the same name or slug already exists — call studio.list_blog_categories first; duplicate slug returns 409.
Caller wants a tag (cross-cutting keyword, flat namespace) — use studio.create_blog_tag; categories are hierarchical.
Caller wants to add a category to a specific post — categories are site-scoped; post assignment happens in update_post.
